headline: Build deep intuition for modern vision systems
subheadline: Learn the path from linear classifiers to transformers, generative models, and multimodal systems.
summary_markdown: Course-first mock overview for the initial refactor. This content will move to server-managed records and can later be replaced with richer production metadata.
learning_outcomes: Understand the core architecture families used in computer vision
Navigate lecture-first learning with transcript, slides, and tutor support
Connect model concepts to practical visual recognition workflows
target_audience: Learners who already know Python basics and introductory machine learning
prerequisites_summary: Comfort with Python, linear algebra, and basic deep learning concepts
structure_snapshot: Lecture-first course with slides, transcripts, and in-context AI tutor support
